understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to occupy all '+' goal tiles with selectable pieces simultaneously, advancing through levels by completing each within a limited number of actions.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece in that direction. If an adjacent pushable block is encountered, it may be pushed. Walls and some boundaries block movement, preventing progress. CLICK on coordinates of a different selectable piece switches control to that piece. Steps are consumed per action; running out ends the game with failure if goals are not satisfied.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to occupy all '+' goal tiles with selectable pieces simultaneously, advancing through levels by completing each within a limited number of actions.
